stocks.impact_theory: NVIDIA announced blowout Q1 2026 earnings on April 15, beating estimates by 20% on surging AI GPU demand from hyperscalers. Economic implications include accelerated AI capex cycle boosting semiconductor supply chain. Market psychology: FOMO buying as investors pile into AI leaders amid tech rally. Historical parallels: Similar to 2023 post-ChatGPT surge where NVDA gained 200% in months. Analogies: 1) Like oil boom for Exxon in 2008; 2) Rocket fuel igniting the entire engine (AI ecosystem).

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web searches reveal headlines like 'NVDA crushes earnings, raises guidance'; X semantic search (20 latest posts) shows 85% positive sentiment with #NVDAtoMoon trending, high engagement on CEO Jensen Huang comments. Analyst upgrades from Goldman Sachs target $180.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long NVDA for 15% upside in 2 weeks on momentum; potential $170 target.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid short; squeeze risk high with gamma ramp.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Overvaluation bubble burst if AI hype cools; supply chain disruptions from Taiwan tensions.

stocks.justification: Strong earnings beat, uniform bullish X/news sentiment, historical momentum precedent.

stocks.impact_theory: Tesla reported Q1 deliveries 15% below consensus on Cybertruck ramp issues and competition from BYD. Economic: Signals slowing EV adoption amid high rates. Psychology: Profit-taking and doubt on robotaxi timeline. Parallels: 2022 delivery miss led to 65% drop. Analogies: 1) Car with flat tire (execution delays); 2) Hype train derailed by reality check.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: News: 'TSLA deliveries disappoint' (CNBC, Reuters); X keyword search (latest 20) 70% negative, memes mocking Elon, #TSLAdump viral. Options flow shows put buying.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Dip buy risky; wait for $220 support.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short for 20% downside to $190; high short interest amplifies.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Elon tweet reversal or surprise robotaxi update could spark short squeeze.

stocks.justification: Clear miss but volatile history; X sentiment bearish but cult following may cap downside.

stocks.impact_theory: Apple unveiled Vision Pro 2 with AI integration at event, but supply chain leaks suggest delays. Implications: Mixed for wearables growth. Psychology: Buy the rumor sell news. Parallels: 2020 iPhone 12 5G hype fade. Analogies: 1) Shiny new toy with missing batteries; 2) Half-baked cake (features promised but delayed).

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web: Mixed reviews on pricing; X: 60% skeptical posts on delays, #AppleFail. Analyst note from Piper: Hold.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long term hold; 5% rebound on services beat.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: EU antitrust fine overhang; China sales weakness.

stocks.justification: Conflicting signals; sentiment mildly negative but stock resilient.

stocks.impact_theory: SMCI won major NVDA server contract for AI data centers. Implications: Capacity expansion fuels AI infra boom. Psychology: Sympathy play to NVDA rally. Parallels: 2023 AI server surge. Analogies: 1) Building the highway for AI cars; 2) Pickaxe seller in gold rush.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: News: Contract announcement; X: High buzz, 90% positive, influencers pumping #SMCI.

stocks.justification: Direct tie to NVDA momentum, strong sentiment shift.

stocks.impact_theory: China announces $100B tech stimulus, Alibaba cloud/AI benefits. Implications: Risk-on China recovery. Psychology: Rotation from US tech. Parallels: 2020 post-COVID bounce. Analogies: 1) Rain after drought for e-comm; 2) Tailwind for grounded plane.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Headlines: 'China stimulus lifts Alibaba'; X: Optimism from Asia accounts, volume spike.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 15% to $120 on policy flow.

stocks.justification: Policy driven, positive but macro sensitive.
